name: fabricator
description: Fabricator helps create and maintain reliable Codex plugins.

interface.shortDescription: Create and maintain reliable Codex plugins.
interface.longDescription: Fabricator helps turn a plugin idea or an existing plugin into a clear, testable Codex workflow. Craft handles the creation and maintenance loop; publishing will arrive as a separate skill.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Fabricator: Craft to create or improve a Codex plugin in this project. For pre-public plugin updates, validated source changes are not complete until the scoped hard-clean, Codex UI install handoff, installed-version/path verification, and fresh-chat runtime check are done or explicitly reported as blocked.
